docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANTHONY ROBINSON, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE FILED BY DEFENDANT ALBERTSON SAFEWAY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOSCA, MARC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBERTSON SAFEWAY $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,590.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANTHONY ROBINSON, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE FILED BY DEFENDANT ALBERTSON SAFEWAY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF MARC TOSCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALBERTSON SAFEWAY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY ROBINSON, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY TOSCA, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERTSON SAFEWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO STORE MANAGER LUCA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOSCA, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERTSON SAFEWAY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERTSON SAFEWAY
